description: ITERATION-2 / resolution completeness: DeepLabV3+ + MobileViT-XS at 1024x1024 (companion to 005 @ 512 and 014 @ 256). Same 10-epoch / batch-8 / Adam-1e-3 / plain-CE recipe as cells 05 and 014. Note: launched with PYTORCH_CUDA_ALLOC_CONF=backend:cudaMallocAsync to work around a host-level NVML bug; this only changes how PyTorch asks the driver for memory and has no effect on training math or comparability with cell 005.
